query:
-- Distribuição de profissionais por tenantId
SELECT tenantId, COUNT(*) as total, GROUP_CONCAT(name ORDER BY name SEPARATOR ', ') as nomes
FROM users
WHERE role = 'professional'
GROUP BY tenantId
ORDER BY tenantId;
